name: Create Directory
description: Create a directory under a configured filesystem root. Set 'parents' to true to create missing intermediate directories (mkdir -p). Existing directories are accepted and reported with created=false. Read-only roots reject mkdir.
creator: Covia

path.description: Directory path relative to the root

parents.description: Create intermediate parents if missing (default false)

created.description: True if a new directory was created

path.description: Absolute host path of the directory
